utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution also includes these 6 items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, features, timeline) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (method, processing_fee, terms) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (service, cost, includes) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (service, cost, includes) — fully specified.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utilities, healthcare, survey with costs) — sufficiently specified.
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown (property_cost, service_costs, total_investment). It also includes extra estimates, but the core breakdown is present — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution lists specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings. We map each: Property type "Luxury Villa - Accessible Design" aligns with "Luxury Villa" under purchase_properties. Financing method "Cash purchase" aligns with purchase_financing "Cash Purchase." Legal service "Premium Legal Package" matches essential_legal_services "Premium Legal Package." Moving service "Corporate Relocation Moving" matches moving_services "Corporate Relocation." Setup services include "Premium Utilities" under utility_setup and "Healthcare Setup" under local_area_integration. The survey "Full Structural Survey" matches property_surveys_inspections "Full Structural Survey."
